template: directive: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — news/vendor piece maps to layout silhouette or vendor glyph; compact grid chosen over full-keyboard outline per brief
subject: Compact macro-pad silhouette (rotary knob, splash-accented branded key with abstract spark glyph, 2x3 key grid, USB-C port) evolving via a dashed arrow out of a smaller faded predecessor pad — nods to Codex Micro being built off Work Louder's existing Creator Micro 2
